title: Unknown Input, Zod 4 Validation, Domain Types, and Output Contracts · Transfer Build
summary: An independent service team receives a different tenant, traffic, trust, persistence, and failure profile and transfers unknown input, zod 4 validation, domain types, and output contracts into a new runtime schema and trusted domain boundary. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of runtime schema and trusted domain boundary with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Model body, params, query, fields, configuration, token claims, database rows, and upstream data as unknown until runtime validation succeeds.
Use Zod 4 strict objects, safeParse, issue paths, bounds, unions, refinements, and error mapping without accepting undeclared properties.
Order decoding, validation, canonicalization, authorization, and effect so normalization cannot change the resource or policy target after checks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Lab Unknown Before Validation
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab team handles case 2836 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to admit unknown input through strict runtime and output schemas; record only bounded redacted diagnostic fields; then rotate a signing key while an old valid session remains within policy. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Lab Unknown Before Validation.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model body, params, query, fields, configuration, token claims, database rows, and upstream data as unknown until runtime validation succeeds. For Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Lab Unknown Before Validation, keep Unknown Before Validation connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
